Article.ArticleTitle: Feeding Minds, Building Societies: The Transformative Power of Universal School Meals.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Loyola University of Chicago, Stritch School of Medicine, Maywood, Illinois, USA.
Morehouse School of Medicine, Atlanta, Georgia, USA.
University of Texas at Austin Dell Medical School, Austin, Texas, USA.
University of Mississippi Medical Center (School of Medicine), Jackson, Mississippi, USA.
Loma Linda University Health Education Consortium, Loma Linda, California, USA.
Division of General and Community Pediatrics at Cincinnati Children's Hospital Medical Center, Cincinnati, Ohio, USA.
Division of General Pediatrics, Hospital Medicine, and Population Health at Maimonides Children's Hospital, Brooklyn, New York, USA.

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: The authors declare no conflicts of interest.
